title: Constituent Casework faculty (service-oriented, privacy-first)
context: Constituent casework tracking is a core service function of the office. The faculty tracks cases with service-only fields (issue, status, next step, outcome); it has no political/profiling/targeting fields or features by design. Constituent data is encrypted; retention and deletion are enforced per task 007. The guardrail layer (task 003) prohibits any non-service use of constituent data. The faculty is mounted behind the guardrail layer and the privacy controls established in task 007.
objective: Implement the Constituent Casework faculty behind the guardrail layer, tracking cases with service-only fields, enforcing privacy controls from task 007, and guardrail-blocking any political/targeting/surveillance use of constituent data.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracks constituent cases with service fields only: issue, status, next step, outcome, minimal contact; no political/affiliation/profiling/targeting fields exist
Constituent data is encrypted per task 007; retention and deletion enforced
Guardrail layer (task 003) blocks any attempt to use casework data for political purposes, targeting, or surveillance
Faculty is mounted behind the guardrail layer; refused-category uses never reach the casework data
Privacy review sign-off and Expert (ethics/legal) sign-off recorded before merge
output: A merged PR implementing the Constituent Casework faculty with service-only fields, privacy controls (encryption, retention, deletion), and guardrail-enforced prohibition on political/targeting use of constituent data.
